capability_summary.can: Insert synthetic shingle sets into MinHashLSH and query by approximate Jaccard similarity; identical sets collide with jaccard>=0.9; near-identical (1 element diff) score >=0.7; threshold parameter controls collision granularity.
capability_summary.cannot: Does not provide exact Jaccard; probabilistic false-negative rate exists at boundary thresholds; no native support for weighted sets without WeightedMinHash variant.
